title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.06 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.06 Game Version 1.06 date June 26, 2024 Summary M. Bison Release. Minor balance changes and bug fixes. Links Patch Notes M. Bison Patch M. Bison released Universal Changes Perfect Parry vs. Projectiles No longer resets the player's Dash input, allowing for immediate Perfect Parry ~ Forward Dash with a 6MPMK~6 input Drive Reversal Fixed bug where a trade could cause a KO at low health Drive Parry Fixed issue where moves that cause a screen shake would not trigger it when parried Taunts Modern Controls input changed from L+M+H+SP → L+M+H+SP+DP+Assist Back Rise (Wakeup) Fixed issue where holding 2 buttons before a knockdown occurred could result in an unintentional Back Rise on wakeup Key Character Changes A.K.I. 5MP Expanded collision box upward to prevent unintended side switches in juggles Akuma Tenmaku Blade Kick (j.2MK) Fixed bug where combo scaling was reduced when it hit immediately before landing Viscera Piercer (5MP~MP) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both MP+MK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DR Cancel) Bone Crusher Axe Kick (5MK~HK) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both HP+HK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DI Cancel) Block Recovery of Various Attacks Fixed issue where Akuma could cancel his recovery on Block earlier than intended with certain actions Applies to 6HP~6HP, 214LK, and 214LP~6P Gou Shoryuken (623P) Fixed bug where Drive Gain on Perfect Parry was less than intended Tatsumaki Zanku-Kyaku (214K) Fixed bug where Drive Gain on Perfect Parry was less than intended Zanku Hadoken (j.236P/PP) Hurtbox expanded forward Upper half of hitbox changed to combo-only hitbox (easier to jump over or counter with anti-air specials) Ashura Senku (6KKK/4KKK) Hurtbox expanded during Teleport movement Will no longer completely overlap with a cornered opponent These changes make it harder for a Teleport to avoid attacks when Akuma has not fully passed through the opponent Shun Goku Satsu (CA) (LP~LP~6LK~HP) Fixed issue where the opponent's charge timing would be reset during the cinematic side switch Blanka 2MK Fixed issue where the extra whiff recovery and expanded hurtbox from Version 1.05 did not apply while SA2 was active Raid Jump (Modern Controls: 2MH~M/H) Fixed issue where Modern Blanka could not perform an Air Throw using the Throw button Rolling Attack / Vertical Rolling Attack ([4]6P / [2]8K) Fixed issue where the opponent would not be pushed back on block while Blanka is rebounding Dee Jay Threebeat Combo 1 (5LP~MK) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both MP+MK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DR Cancel) MK/HK Jackknife Maximum ([2]8MK/HK) Now throw invuln on frames 5-6 Ed Assist Combo 3 Fixed issue where the input buffer did not work if stopped after the initial 5H (5HP) and then restarted again Body Blow Combination (5MP~HP) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both HP+HK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DI Cancel) Hitman Combination 1 (5MK~MK) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both MP+MK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DR Cancel) Low Smash Combination (2HK~HP) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both HP+HK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DI Cancel) E. Honda OD Sumo Smash ([2]8KK) Now throw invuln on frames 5-13 Jamie SA1 (236236K) Drive Damage on Block reduced by 200 Opponent's Drive Gain on Parry reduced by 2000 Version 1.05 caused SA1 to gain an extra hit, so these changes restore the values to their previous version JP Assist Combo 2 Now activates SA2 when OD Stribog is blocked or absorbed by armor Juri Death Crest 1 (5MP~4HP) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both HP+HK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DI Cancel) OD Fuhajin (214KK) Version 1.05 reduced the startup time, but failed to adjust various properties (Fuha Stock timing, projectile clash, proximity guard) to match the faster startup Fuha stock obtained 14f → 12f Projectile clash hitbox appears 12f → 10f Proximity guard hitbox starts 7f → 5f and expanded to match the full range of the attack hitbox Ken Quick Dash (KK) Now only takes priority over OD kick specials when all 3 Kick buttons are pressed In Version 1.05, any 5KK input would cause Quick Dash to take priority, even after inputting the command for a special move Kimberly OD Sprint (236KK) Fixed bug that would cause sound effect not to play Bushin Senpukyaku (214K) Added Throw Invuln to the 1st hit, starting on the 2nd active frame for each version 214LK now throw invuln on frames 7-11 214MK now throw invuln on frames 8-12 214HK now throw invuln on frames 9-13 214KK now throw invuln on frames 7-11 Luke Assist Combo 1 Input is now accepted during the chain cancel window Marisa Assist Combo 1 Input is now accepted during the chain cancel window Rashid HP Spinning Mixer (236HP Regular/Enhanced) Now throw invuln on frames 8-10 Zangief 5MK Attack hitbox reverted to its pre-1.05 version, slightly reducing its range Tundra Storm (Modern Controls: 22H) Fixed issue where a previous input leniency adjustment was not applied to Modern controls

items.text: M. Bison released
items.html: M. Bison released

lists.text: Perfect Parry vs. Projectiles No longer resets the player's Dash input, allowing for immediate Perfect Parry ~ Forward Dash with a 6MPMK~6 input Drive Reversal Fixed bug where a trade could cause a KO at low health Drive Parry Fixed issue where moves that cause a screen shake would not trigger it when parried Taunts Modern Controls input changed from L+M+H+SP → L+M+H+SP+DP+Assist Back Rise (Wakeup) Fixed issue where holding 2 buttons before a knockdown occurred could result in an unintentional Back Rise on wakeup

items.text: Perfect Parry vs. Projectiles No longer resets the player's Dash input, allowing for immediate Perfect Parry ~ Forward Dash with a 6MPMK~6 input
items.html:
Perfect Parry vs. Projectiles
  • No longer resets the player's Dash input, allowing for immediate Perfect Parry ~ Forward Dash with a 6MPMK~6 input

items.text: Drive Reversal Fixed bug where a trade could cause a KO at low health
items.html:
Drive Reversal
  • Fixed bug where a trade could cause a KO at low health

items.text: Drive Parry Fixed issue where moves that cause a screen shake would not trigger it when parried
items.html:
Drive Parry
  • Fixed issue where moves that cause a screen shake would not trigger it when parried

items.text: Taunts Modern Controls input changed from L+M+H+SP → L+M+H+SP+DP+Assist
items.html:
Taunts
  • Modern Controls input changed from L+M+H+SP → L+M+H+SP+DP+Assist

items.text: Back Rise (Wakeup) Fixed issue where holding 2 buttons before a knockdown occurred could result in an unintentional Back Rise on wakeup
items.html:
Back Rise (Wakeup)
  • Fixed issue where holding 2 buttons before a knockdown occurred could result in an unintentional Back Rise on wakeup

lists.text: Tenmaku Blade Kick (j.2MK) Fixed bug where combo scaling was reduced when it hit immediately before landing Viscera Piercer (5MP~MP) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both MP+MK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DR Cancel) Bone Crusher Axe Kick (5MK~HK) 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both HP+HK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DI Cancel) Block Recovery of Various Attacks Fixed issue where Akuma could cancel his recovery on Block earlier than intended with certain actions Applies to 6HP~6HP, 214LK, and 214LP~6P Gou Shoryuken (623P) Fixed bug where Drive Gain on Perfect Parry was less than intended Tatsumaki Zanku-Kyaku (214K) Fixed bug where Drive Gain on Perfect Parry was less than intended Zanku Hadoken (j.236P/PP) Hurtbox expanded forward Upper half of hitbox changed to combo-only hitbox (easier to jump over or counter with anti-air specials) Ashura Senku (6KKK/4KKK) Hurtbox expanded during Teleport movement Will no longer completely overlap with a cornered opponent These changes make it harder for a Teleport to avoid attacks when Akuma has not fully passed through the opponent Shun Goku Satsu (CA) (LP~LP~6LK~HP) Fixed issue where the opponent's charge timing would be reset during the cinematic side switch

items.text: Tenmaku Blade Kick (j.2MK) Fixed bug where combo scaling was reduced when it hit immediately before landing
items.html:
Tenmaku Blade Kick (j.2MK)
  • Fixed bug where combo scaling was reduced when it hit immediately before landing

  • 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both MP+MK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DR Cancel)

Bone Crusher Axe Kick (5MK~HK)
  • 2nd hit can no longer be performed when inputting both HP+HK (to prevent accidental TC when attempting a DI Cancel)

items.text: Block Recovery of Various Attacks Fixed issue where Akuma could cancel his recovery on Block earlier than intended with certain actions Applies to 6HP~6HP, 214LK, and 214LP~6P
items.html:
Block Recovery of Various Attacks
  • Fixed issue where Akuma could cancel his recovery on Block earlier than intended with certain actions
  • Applies to 6HP~6HP, 214LK, and 214LP~6P

items.text: Gou Shoryuken (623P) Fixed bug where Drive Gain on Perfect Parry was less than intended
items.html:
Gou Shoryuken (623P)

items.text: Zanku Hadoken (j.236P/PP) Hurtbox expanded forward Upper half of hitbox changed to combo-only hitbox (easier to jump over or counter with anti-air specials)
items.html:
Zanku Hadoken (j.236P/PP)
  • Hurtbox expanded forward
  • Upper half of hitbox changed to combo-only hitbox (easier to jump over or counter with anti-air specials)

items.text: Ashura Senku (6KKK/4KKK) Hurtbox expanded during Teleport movement Will no longer completely overlap with a cornered opponent These changes make it harder for a Teleport to avoid attacks when Akuma has not fully passed through the opponent
items.html:
Ashura Senku (6KKK/4KKK)
  • Hurtbox expanded during Teleport movement
  • Will no longer completely overlap with a cornered opponent
  • These changes make it harder for a Teleport to avoid attacks when Akuma has not fully passed through the opponent

items.text: Shun Goku Satsu (CA) (LP~LP~6LK~HP) Fixed issue where the opponent's charge timing would be reset during the cinematic side switch
items.html:
Shun Goku Satsu (CA) (LP~LP~6LK~HP)
  • Fixed issue where the opponent's charge timing would be reset during the cinematic side switch
